selected_candidate: Add a first-class recommendation workgraph readiness packet in AO Atlas.
alternatives_rejected: Only rely on recommendation-readback.json; rejected because node 28 requires a separate workgraph readiness packet.
Only document the current readback fields; rejected because production readiness needs executable artifact coverage.
Emit a packet from AO Mission; rejected because this node is Atlas-owned and derives from Atlas recommendation workgraph state.
decision: Implement a typed packet, validator, schema, CLI emission, tests, and production-readiness assertions in AO Atlas.
